description:
JSON output for `rocky state retention sweep`.

Mirrors [`rocky_core::retention::SweepReport`] with the version/command envelope every CLI JSON output carries. `dry_run = true` reports counts that *would* result without touching the state store.

audit_deleted.description: Quality snapshots (`quality_history`) deleted, or that would be deleted.

domains.description: Domains that were considered in this sweep, as the canonical lowercase strings (`"history"`, `"lineage"`, `"audit"`).

dry_run.description: `true` when `--dry-run` was set; the state store was left untouched.

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the sweep in milliseconds.

lineage_deleted.description: DAG snapshots (`dag_snapshots`) deleted, or that would be deleted.

max_age_days.description: Configured retention window in days at the time of the sweep.

min_runs_kept.description: Configured per-domain floor at the time of the sweep.

runs_deleted.description: Run records (`run_history`) deleted, or that would be deleted in dry-run mode.

runs_kept.description: Run records remaining after the sweep.

title: RetentionSweepOutput
